title: [LowerToHW] Fix reg init via verbatim ops

features.name: register initialization with RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT pattern
features.description: Code should include a register declaration with initialization in an initial block guarded by RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT, using _RANDOM variable assignment from RANDOM

features.name: register direct initialization from random variable
features.description: Code should include a register that receives its initial value via direct assignment from a _RANDOM variable in an initial block
